---
title: "Constance O’Brien"
---

## Constance O’Brien

### Description

contributor of articles on Shakespeare, etc., to <i>MP</i> (1878-90), possibly the playwright of that name.  She appears to have been President of a Shakespeare Society.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 12th [1877] 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
